title: Life Criteria: Searching for an Eighth Criterion of Life — Code and Data
description: Source code, experiment scripts, analysis pipeline, and simulation data for the ALIFE 2026 paper 'Searching for an Eighth Criterion of Life: A Falsifiable Framework and Two Null Results'. Implements all seven biological criteria as ablatable processes in a hybrid swarm-organism simulator, then tests two candidate eighth criteria (within-lifetime memory/EMA and collective kin-sensing) across three perturbation regimes with population cap relaxation experiments.
